desc: A prose description of the place, providing context about its historical significance, geographic location, and relevance to manuscript production or transmission. This field can accommodate a short phrase or a full paragraph.

rel_con.label: Place name as it appears in an external authority file
Place name as it appears in Library of Congress authority

cataloguer.message: Cataloguer message describing what was done in this edit, e.g. initial description or update to existing record.
Second cataloguer entry to show the field is repeatable. Describes a subsequent edit or update.
